name: The Great Fusilli (From: Courage The Cowardly Dog)
description:
"Ah! Bellissimo! The stage...she call you, no? Yes~ Ha ha ha! Just ask my actors! Don't see them? Oh, don't worry! That's the magic! Join the stage, wear the costume, play the part, be the star~ You hear the applause, the cheers, the magic! All your fears...they go. And then, oh then...you stay forever~"

(After the Great Fusilli was defeated by Courage in his own trap.)

"Ah heh hehm hem...How. Now. Brown. COW~!"
creator: Starburn X
